inputs.label: Property Price
inputs.businessContext: Total purchase price of the multi-unit property.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total purchase price of the multi-unit property.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çok birimli mülkün toplam satın alma fiyatı.

inputs.label: Down Payment
inputs.businessContext: Cash amount paid upfront (typically 20% of property price).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cash amount paid upfront (typically 20% of property price).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Peşin ödenen nakit miktarı (genellikle mülk fiyatının %20'si).

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the mortgage loan in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the mortgage loan in years.

inputs.label: Monthly Rental Income
inputs.businessContext: Gross monthly rental income from all rented units before vacancy and expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gross monthly rental income from all rented units before vacancy and expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm kiralanan birimlerden boşluk ve giderler öncesi brüt aylık kira geliri.

inputs.label: Monthly Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly costs including property taxes, insurance, maintenance, property management, and other expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total monthly costs including property taxes, insurance, maintenance, property management, and other expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emlak vergisi, sigorta, bakım, mülk yönetimi ve diğer giderler dahil toplam aylık maliyetler.

inputs.label: Vacancy Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of time the rental units are vacant.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of time the rental units are vacant.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiralık birimlerin boş olması beklenen yüzde oranı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
